'''kazhunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readenylation|readenylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readenylation|readenylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kazhunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzhinith|kæzhinith]] || [[word:kæzhinij|kæzhinij]] || [[word:kæzhinish|kæzhinish]] || [[word:kæzhini|kæzhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazhuzhunuth|kazhuzhunuth]] || [[word:kazhuzhunuj|kazhuzhunuj]] || [[word:kazhuzhunush|kazhuzhunush]] || [[word:kazhuzhunu|kazhuzhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazhunuth|kazhunuth]] || [[word:kazhunuj|kazhunuj]] || [[word:kazhunush|kazhunush]] || [[word:kazhunu|kazhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazhufnuth|kazhufnuth]] || [[word:kazhufnuj|kazhufnuj]] || [[word:kazhufnush|kazhufnush]] || [[word:kazhufnuf|kazhufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazhunuthu|kazhunuthu]] || [[word:kazhunuju|kazhunuju]] || [[word:kazhunushu|kazhunushu]] || [[word:kazhunuku|kazhunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazhunuth|kazhunuth]] || [[word:kazhunuj|kazhunuj]] || [[word:kazhunush|kazhunush]] || [[word:kazhunu|kazhunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazhunuthul|kazhunuthul]] || [[word:kazhunujul|kazhunujul]] || [[word:kazhunushul|kazhunushul]] || [[word:kazhunukul|kazhunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazhunuthuthu|kazhunuthuthu]] || [[word:kazhunujuju|kazhunujuju]] || [[word:kazhunushushu|kazhunushushu]] || [[word:kazhunuku|kazhunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazhunuthun|kazhunuthun]] || [[word:kazhunujun|kazhunujun]] || [[word:kazhunushun|kazhunushun]] || [[word:kazhunukun|kazhunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazhunuthuoro|kazhunuthuoro]] || [[word:kazhunujuoro|kazhunujuoro]] || [[word:kazhunushuoro|kazhunushuoro]] || [[word:kazhunukuoro|kazhunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
